about.title: What is TEDx?
about.body: TEDx is an independently organized event that brings the spirit of TED to local communities. Each TEDx introduces fresh ideas, new perspectives and the inspiration to change. The TEDxZhenysPark conference is officially licensed and the first regional-level event in the history of Turkestan.

theme.title: Renewal
theme.subtitle: Theme of 2026
theme.body: Renewal is learning from the past, rethinking the present and building tomorrow anew. We bring nine speakers to one stage — each with their own idea of renewal in their field.

schedule.title: Programme of the day
schedule.subtitle: 9 speakers · 3 Q&A · music guest
schedule.note1: Two-minute buffer between speakers — moderator transition, applause, microphone change.
schedule.note2: Lunch arranged for 10 people — speakers and core team.

footer.rights: This independent TEDx event is operated under license from TED
